overview: MiniMax M2.7 / M2.7-highspeed is a large language model from MiniMax, part of the MiniMax M-Series line. Released 2026-03-18. MiniMax's flagship MoE LLM line built for coding and agentic/tool-use workflows, shipped as fast point releases.
What's notable in this version: Self-improvement-focused update; ~205K context; standard plus a low-latency highspeed variant; GPQA Diamond 87.4%.
